findings.traceEvidence: SiteHeader sticky layout with h-16 covers elements scrolled to the top of the viewport by Playwright, preventing standard clicking actions.
findings.rootCause: The browser scrolls elements to the absolute top of the viewport, placing them underneath the z-50 SiteHeader. Previously this was worked around using force: true clicks, which masks actual user layout issues.
findings.fix: Added scroll-mt-20 class to the key actionable Card and action bar containers in routes (places list, place details, visit history, favorites list). This naturally positions scrolled elements 20px / 5rem below the header, making them fully actionable.

findings.traceEvidence: pnpm throws ERR_PNPM_ABORTED_REMOVE_MODULES_DIR_NO_TTY inside node:24-bookworm container when executing static check script in non-interactive shell.
findings.rootCause: In headless environments, pnpm requires the CI=true environment variable to safely purge directories or modify node_modules without interactive TTY prompt confirmation.
findings.fix: Passed -e CI=true to the docker run node container inside the scripts/check script.
